comments: Got a rejection notice in the portal and then a follow up email. Did not receive an interview so I already knew. I do want to commend them because although I believe the email letter went to everyone, it was thoughtful and I really did appreciate what they had to say. Its crazy to me that so many programs don't send official rejections at all. So although its not what I hoped in December, I did really appreciate it as a really kind email.
